title: War Hammer
description: Whenever you kill an [gold]Elite[/gold], [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]4[/blue] random cards.
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Only upgrades cards that are upgradable. Triggers after defeating an Elite, shuffling the deck and selecting 4 random upgradable cards to upgrade.
